name: Supabase CLI
description: Installs the Supabase CLI. Requires the docker-in-docker (or docker-outside-of-docker) feature — Supabase needs a Docker daemon to start local services. Pre-pulls Supabase Docker images on first container start via postStartCommand.

version.description: Version of the Supabase CLI to install (e.g. '2.84.2'). Must match a tag on the supabase/cli GitHub releases page.

dockerWaitSeconds.description: Seconds to wait for the Docker daemon to become ready before pre-pulling Supabase images.
